name: Morgan Stanley Depositary Shares each representing 1/1000th of a share of 4.250% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series O
summary: Morgan Stanley Depositary Shares each representing 1/1000th of a share of 4.250% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series O, represent fractional ownership in Morgan Stanley's preferred stock. The Series O preferred stock pays a fixed dividend of 4.250%. The dividends are non-cumulative, meaning any unpaid dividends do not accrue.
